name: StackPath Edge CDN and Security API
what_it_does: Edge platform combining CDN, WAF, DDoS protection, and serverless edge compute with REST API — enabling developers to distribute content across 50+ global PoPs, protect applications with web application firewall rules, mitigate DDoS attacks, and run serverless workloads at the edge with JavaScript edge functions.
use_cases: Distributing content via StackPath CDN API for global static asset delivery optimization
Configuring WAF rules via StackPath API for application security protection
Purging StackPath CDN cache via API for deployment and content update pipelines
Deploying JavaScript edge workers via StackPath API for serverless edge compute
Querying StackPath traffic analytics and security events via API for monitoring
not_for: Enterprise-scale CDN competing with Akamai or Cloudflare at the top end
Non-JavaScript edge compute (StackPath edge functions are JavaScript only)
best_when: A developer or company needs integrated CDN + WAF + DDoS protection with edge compute — at more competitive pricing than Cloudflare Enterprise but with similar features.
avoid_when: You need the largest CDN network (Akamai/Cloudflare), non-JavaScript edge functions, or enterprise SLA with dedicated support.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for API access. Client ID + Secret from StackPath portal. Bearer token auth. Access tokens expire (must refresh). Scoped access per service (CDN, WAF, Edge Compute). No webhooks. No API key auth — OAuth2 only. REST API fully documented at stackpath.dev.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go from $10/month minimum; CDN from $0.01/GB; WAF from $10/site/month
pricing.notes: Dallas company. Founded 2017 via merger/acquisition by StackPath LLC. Acquired MaxCDN, Highwinds CDN, and other assets. Private equity-backed. 50+ global PoPs. Formerly MaxCDN (popular WordPress CDN). Edge Serverless JavaScript functions. WAF with managed rulesets. DDoS protection included. Used by WooCommerce, WordPress hosting providers, media companies. US and EU market focus. Integration with popular WordPress plugins (W3 Total Cache, WP Rocket).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI documentation at stackpath.dev. OAuth2 client credentials. No webhooks — must poll. SOC2 and PCI-DSS compliant. Credit card required. OAuth2 token refresh required (tokens expire). Multiple service APIs (CDN, WAF, Edge, DNS) under same auth. Rate limits not documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: CDN site reads fully idempotent. WAF rule reads idempotent by ID. Cache purge idempotent by URL. Site creation not idempotent — check by domain. Edge function reads idempotent by name.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 only — no API key option; token refresh required for long-running agents
No webhooks — must poll for configuration changes and deployment status
Credit card required at signup — no trial without payment method
Multiple service APIs (CDN, WAF, Edge Compute) under one auth — different endpoints
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency API calls

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and PCI-DSS compliant. OAuth2 client credentials with scoped access. Token expiry (good security practice). WAF and DDoS protection built-in. Managed WAF rulesets for OWASP Top 10. Acquired MaxCDN team with strong security focus. No API key auth reduces credential exposure risk. PCI-DSS compliance for payment applications.
